name: Brigadeiros
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir together the sweetened condensed milk, powdered chocolate, and butter over medium heat until you can see the bottom of the saucepan, about 20 minutes. It should form a thick paste.
2. Allow the mixture to cool slightly so it's safe to handle.
3. Using oiled hands, shape the mixture into small walnut-sized balls.
4. Roll each ball in granulated chocolate until completely coated.
